title: Source code should only use /* ... */ style comments
description: Source code should only use /* ... */ style commentsAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellconventionbased-on-misraWhy is this an issue?More InfoThis excludes the use of//C99 style comments and C++ style comments, since these are not permitted in C90. Many compilers support the//style of comments as an extension to C90.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
// This is a C++ style comment  // Noncompliant in C90
int value = 42;
int x = 10;  // Inline C++ comment  // Noncompliant

// Multi-line C++ style comments
// are also non-compliant in C90  // Noncompliant
compliant:
/* This is a C-style comment */  /* Compliant */
int value = 42;
int x = 10;  /* Inline C-style comment */  /* Compliant */

checks.message: Source code should only use /* ... */ style comments. Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
